PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Continued To Jan-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-21-2022 Continued To Oct-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition By Executor To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carol Hoffman, in court, for and with Joan Bell, Executor.

The court advises that it is convinced that the petitioners have established presumption and have overcome evidence code 662 and it is ready to take the matter under submission. Counsel provides brief testimony in support of the petition and confirms that there are no creditor's claims.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Duong. Not Reported.

Petition By Executor To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Continued To Jun-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carol Hoffman, via ZOOM, for Joan Bell, Petitioner.

The court begins by confirming with counsel that she has seen the Examiner's notes. Ms. Hoffman reports that the decedent died five years ago and that a copy of the will had been included in the initial petition filed in July and thus should not be required to be published once again. The court advises that it is waiving any defects in notice. No objections to the court's decision are presented. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 4/26/2007 is admitted to probate. Joan Cecilia Bell is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for 9/21/2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
